workflow.quality_gate: cd /Users/deligoez/Developer/github/deligoez/rp && go build ./... && go test ./... && go vet ./...

tasks.title: Initialize Go project structure
tasks.description: Set up go.mod, main.go, directory structure
tasks.acceptance:
- go.mod exists with module github.com/deligoez/rp and Go 1.24+
- main.go exists and calls cmd.Execute()
- Directories exist: cmd/, internal/manifest/, internal/git/, internal/deps/, internal/ui/
- go build ./... succeeds
- cobra dependency added to go.mod
tasks.closed_reason: Go project initialized: go.mod (Go 1.25.6), main.go calling cmd.Execute(), cobra dependency, all 5 directories created (cmd/, internal/manifest/, internal/git/, internal/deps/, internal/ui/), go build succeeds

tasks.title: Manifest struct definitions
tasks.description: Define Manifest, OwnerGroup, RepoEntry types
tasks.acceptance:
- RepoEntry struct: Repo, Owner, Category, LocalPath, CloneURL, IsArchive, IsFlat, Deps []string
- OwnerGroup struct: Name string, IsFlat bool, Repos []RepoEntry
- Manifest struct: BaseDir string, owners data
- Manifest.Repos() []RepoEntry placeholder
- Manifest.Owners() []OwnerGroup placeholder

tasks.title: Manifest YAML parsing via yaml.Node
tasks.description: Custom UnmarshalYAML with yaml.Node for order-preserving owner/category parsing
tasks.acceptance:
- Custom UnmarshalYAML reads flat as bool, archive as []RepoEntry with IsArchive:true, remaining keys as categories
- Uses yaml.Node for iteration to preserve YAML document order
- Manifest.Repos() returns flat list in YAML document order
- Manifest.Owners() returns []OwnerGroup in manifest order

tasks.title: Manifest path resolution logic
tasks.description: Implement tilde expansion and directory mapping rules for all 4 modes

tasks.title: Manifest validation rules
tasks.description: Implement all 8 validation rules from spec 2.4
tasks.acceptance:
- base_dir required and non-empty
- repo format: exactly one /, alphanumeric+hyphens+underscores+dots
- No duplicate repos across entire manifest
- Owner/category names: non-empty, no /, no .., no null bytes
- At least one owner with at least one repo
- flat/archive reserved as category names; flat must be boolean
- deps values must be non-empty strings
- Categories must have non-empty repo lists

tasks.title: Manifest Load function with tests
tasks.description: Wire up Load(path) and write all 19 manifest tests
tasks.acceptance:
- Load(path string) (*Manifest, error) reads file, parses YAML, validates, expands tilde
- All 19 manifest tests pass (spec 7.1 #1-#19)

tasks.title: Git Clone/IsRepo functions
tasks.description: Implement Clone and IsRepo by shelling out to git
tasks.acceptance:
- Clone(url, path) shells out to git clone
- IsRepo(path) checks for .git directory
- Tests #1, #2, #5 pass (IsRepo git dir, IsRepo non-git, Clone)

tasks.title: Git Status function
tasks.description: Implement Status with dirty count, branch, ahead/behind, detached HEAD fallback
tasks.acceptance:
- Status(path) returns RepoStatus{Clean, DirtyFiles, Branch, Ahead, Behind, HasUpstream}
- Uses git status --porcelain for dirty count (all lines)
- Branch via git symbolic-ref --short HEAD, fallback to git rev-parse --short HEAD on detached HEAD
- Ahead/behind via git rev-list --left-right --count; HasUpstream=false with Ahead=0 Behind=0 when no tracking
- Tests #3, #4, #7, #11, #12, #13 pass

tasks.title: Git Pull function with typed errors
tasks.description: Implement Pull with PullResult, ErrDiverged, ErrNoUpstream
tasks.acceptance:
- Pull(path) returns PullResult{NewCommits, AlreadyUpToDate}
- Records HEAD via rev-parse before, counts via rev-list after
- Returns ErrDiverged on ff-only failure, ErrNoUpstream when no tracking branch
- On error PullResult is zero-valued
- Tests #8, #9, #10 pass

tasks.title: Git LastCommitDate function
tasks.description: Implement LastCommitDate using git log
tasks.acceptance:
- LastCommitDate(path) returns time.Time via git log -1 --format=%cI
- Test #6 passes

tasks.title: Deps RunDeps function with tests
tasks.description: Implement RunDeps via sh -c with exec.Cmd.Dir
tasks.acceptance:
- RunDeps(path, commands) runs each command via sh -c with exec.Cmd.Dir
- Stops on first failure with command name and stderr in error
- Empty list is no-op
- All 7 deps tests pass (spec 7.3 #1-#7)

tasks.title: UI status symbols with lipgloss
tasks.description: Implement OK/!!/XX symbols with color support
tasks.acceptance:
- OK (green), !! (yellow), XX (red) using lipgloss
- NO_COLOR env var and --no-color flag disable styles
- Symbols are exported constants/functions

tasks.title: UI formatting helpers
tasks.description: Implement plural, aligned output, summary line formatting
tasks.acceptance:
- Plural helper: '1 commit' vs '3 commits', '1 file' vs '3 files'
- Aligned output helper for repo label + status columns
- Summary line formatting (-- Summary -- with counts)

tasks.title: Worker pool with buffered output
tasks.description: Concurrent worker pool that buffers results per worker
tasks.acceptance:
- Configurable concurrency
- Each worker processes one repo, buffers result into struct
- Results printed in manifest order after all complete
- Errors in one worker don't stop others

tasks.title: Worker pool stderr progress line
tasks.description: Add progress indicator on stderr with TTY detection
tasks.acceptance:
- Progress line on stderr: [N/total] {verb}... overwritten with carriage return
- Verb configurable per command (cloning/syncing/installing)
- Suppressed on non-TTY stderr

tasks.title: Root cobra command with global flags
tasks.description: Set up cobra root command with manifest/concurrency/no-color flags
tasks.acceptance:
- Root command 'rp' with cobra
- --manifest/-m default ~/.config/rp/manifest.yaml, RP_MANIFEST env
- --concurrency/-c default 4 (>=1), RP_CONCURRENCY env (invalid ignored)
- --no-color + NO_COLOR env var
- CLI flags > env vars > defaults

tasks.title: Bootstrap command implementation
tasks.description: Clone missing repos in parallel with dry-run
tasks.acceptance:
- Loads manifest, clones missing repos via worker pool
- Skips existing git repos, errors on non-git-dir
- Creates parent dirs with os.MkdirAll 0755
- Output grouped by owner, summary line
- --dry-run exits 0
- Exit 0 or 2

tasks.title: Sync command implementation
tasks.description: Pull clean repos, skip dirty/unpushed, clone missing
tasks.acceptance:
- Behavior order: not-cloned->clone, non-git->error, dirty->skip, unpushed(if upstream)->skip, clean->pull
- Distinguishes ErrDiverged/ErrNoUpstream/generic via errors.Is()
- Workers continue on clone failure
- --dry-run shows would-do format
- Exit 0/1/2 highest-wins

tasks.title: Status command implementation
tasks.description: Show repo states grouped by owner with colors
tasks.acceptance:
- Shows clean/dirty/branch/ahead/behind per repo
- Detached HEAD shows short SHA
- Format: {label} {symbol} {branch} [{~N dirty} {+N ahead} {-N behind}]
- Color: OK=green, !!=yellow, XX=red
- Summary line
- Exit 0 or 1

tasks.title: Deps command implementation
tasks.description: Run manifest deps for all or filtered repos
tasks.acceptance:
- No args = all repos with deps; filter = exact match
- Filter not found = exit 2; match but no deps = message + exit 0
- Sequential commands per repo, parallel repos
- Output per command, summary
- Exit 0 or 2

tasks.title: Archive command implementation
tasks.description: Report stale repos based on commit date threshold
tasks.acceptance:
- Scans non-archive repos on disk
- Stale if today - commit_date >= threshold
- Dynamic threshold in header
- Suggestion includes manifest edit reminder
- Always exits 0

tasks.title: List command implementation
tasks.description: Hierarchical repo listing with --missing filter
tasks.acceptance:
- Category sub-headers with bare repo names
- Flat owners: repos at category-header indent level
- Shows path and OK/XX missing
- --missing omits fully-cloned groups
- Summary: N total, N missing
- Exit 0 or 1

tasks.title: Manifest init command implementation
tasks.description: Scan directory tree, generate manifest YAML
tasks.acceptance:
- Walks max depth 4, skips .git dirs and symlinks
- Parses SSH/HTTPS GitHub URLs (with/without .git)
- Skips non-GitHub, reports to stderr
- Infers flat/categorized per owner; mixed -> repos fallback + warning
- --output existing file = abort
- --dry-run shows discovered repos
- Exit 0 or 2
